/usr/bin/cc -flto -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/libcss_css21.dir/contrib/libcss/test/css21.c.o -o libcss_css21  -Wl,-rpath,/app/build/contrib/libcss:/app/build/contrib/libnsutils:/app/build/contrib/libparserutils contrib/libcss/libcss.so.1 contrib/libnsutils/libnsutils.so.1 contrib/libparserutils/libparserutils.so.1
